records.question: Which documents that have related document functional areas and document sections with a section title exactly equal to 'after', a section sequence at least 4510, and a section code exactly equal to '14', also have a document name exactly equal to 'Learning English' and a document type code exactly equal to 'Book'?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_code FROM documents
JOIN document_functional_areas ON documents.document_code = document_functional_areas.document_code
JOIN document_sections ON documents.document_code = document_sections.document_code
WHERE document_sections.section_title = 'after' AND document_sections.section_sequence >= 4510 AND documents.document_name = 'Learning English' AND documents.document_type_code = 'Book' AND document_sections.section_code = '14'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT documents.document_code
FROM documents
JOIN document_sections ON documents.document_code = document_sections.document_code
JOIN document_sections_images ON document_sections.section_id = document_sections_images.section_id
JOIN images ON document_sections_images.image_id = images.image_id
JOIN document_functional_areas ON documents.document_code = document_functional_areas.document_code
WHERE document_sections.section_title = 'after'
  AND document_sections.section_sequence >= 4510
  AND document_sections.section_code = '14'
  AND documents.document_name = 'Learning English'
  AND documents.document_type_code = 'Book'

SELECT documents.document_code FROM documents

JOIN document_functional_areas ON documents.document_code = document_functional_areas.document_code
JOIN document_sections ON documents.document_code = document_sections.document_code
WHERE document_sections.section_sequence = 4433 AND document_structures.document_structure_description = 'Bib' AND documents.access_count = 2294

FROM documents
JOIN document_sections ON documents.document_code = document_sections.document_code

  AND documents.document_structure_code = 'Bib'
  AND document_sections.section_sequence = 4433

SELECT documents.document_code FROM documents
WHERE documents.access_count <= 6345 AND documents.document_type_code = 'CV' AND documents.document_name = 'David CV'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT documents.document_code
FROM documents
WHERE documents.document_name = 'David CV'
  AND documents.document_type_code = 'CV'
  AND documents.access_count <= 6345

records.question: What documents named John CV with type CV belong to a structure under parent code 8 and have sections titled after with section code 93 and sequence number at least 4964?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_code FROM documents
JOIN document_structures ON documents.document_structure_code = document_structures.document_structure_code
JOIN document_functional_areas ON documents.document_code = document_functional_areas.document_code
JOIN document_sections ON documents.document_code = document_sections.document_code
WHERE document_sections.section_code = '93' AND documents.document_type_code = 'CV' AND documents.document_name = 'John CV' AND document_structures.parent_document_structure_code = '8' AND document_sections.section_title = 'after' AND document_sections.section_sequence >= 4964
records.pred_sql:
SELECT documents.document_code
FROM documents
JOIN document_sections ON documents.document_code = document_sections.document_code
WHERE documents.document_name = 'John CV'
  AND documents.document_type_code = 'CV'
  AND documents.document_structure_code IN (
    SELECT document_structure_code
    FROM document_structures
    WHERE parent_document_structure_code = '8'
  )
  AND document_sections.section_title LIKE 'after'
  AND document_sections.section_code = '93'
  AND document_sections.section_sequence >= 4964

records.question: Which documents named Learning Japanese with exactly 2910 accesses have an Author section?

SELECT documents.document_code FROM documents
JOIN document_structures ON documents.document_structure_code = document_structures.document_structure_code
JOIN document_functional_areas ON documents.document_code = document_functional_areas.document_code
WHERE document_structures.document_structure_description = 'Author section' AND documents.access_count = 2910 AND documents.document_name = 'Learning Japanese'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT documents.document_code
FROM documents
JOIN document_sections ON documents.document_code = document_sections.document_code
WHERE documents.document_name = 'Learning Japanese' AND documents.access_count = 2910 AND document_sections.section_title = 'Author'

records.question: Which books have been accessed exactly 1864 times, belong to section 14, and are linked to a document structure with parent code 1?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_code FROM documents
JOIN document_structures ON documents.document_structure_code = document_structures.document_structure_code
JOIN document_functional_areas ON documents.document_code = document_functional_areas.document_code
JOIN document_sections ON documents.document_code = document_sections.document_code
WHERE documents.document_type_code = 'Book' AND document_sections.section_code = '14' AND documents.access_count = 1864 AND document_structures.parent_document_structure_code = '1'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT documents.document_code
FROM documents
JOIN document_sections ON documents.document_code = document_sections.document_code
WHERE documents.access_count = 1864 AND document_sections.section_id = 14 AND documents.document_structure_code IN (
    SELECT document_structure_code
    FROM document_structures
    WHERE parent_document_structure_code = 1
)

records.question: Which documents named Fall Sails are Advertisements with access counts at most 7509, belong to a parent structure code 1, and include sections with code 72 and a sequence of at least 9847?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_code FROM documents
JOIN document_structures ON documents.document_structure_code = document_structures.document_structure_code
JOIN document_sections ON documents.document_code = document_sections.document_code
WHERE documents.document_name = 'Fall Sails' AND document_sections.section_sequence >= 9847 AND documents.document_type_code = 'Advertisement' AND document_sections.section_code = '72' AND documents.access_count <= 7509 AND document_structures.parent_document_structure_code = '1'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT documents.document_code
FROM documents
JOIN document_sections ON documents.document_code = document_sections.document_code
WHERE documents.document_name = 'Fall Sails'
  AND documents.document_type_code = 'Advertisement'
  AND documents.access_count <= 7509
  AND documents.document_structure_code = 1
  AND document_sections.section_code = 72
  AND document_sections.section_sequence >= 9847
